title: INF-9 Cross-session state restore (SSM state persistence to disk + rehydration) [MULTI-QUARTER]
goal: Implement persist_to_disk + load_from_disk for SSMStateSnapshot per refinement INF-9 feature_parity_detail: 'cross-session state restore (state-vector persistence + restore)'. SSM state survives Handshake process restart; operator can resume a long-running RWKV chat from a saved state.
expected_diff_shape: Edit src/backend/handshake_core/src/model_runtime/candle/state_vector.rs to add persist_to_disk/load_from_disk + StateVectorArtifact metadata via ArtifactStore; tests.
unblock_conditions: MT-088 state-vector primitive + MT-114 prefix-reuse merged.
implementation_notes: Per refinement INF-9 feature_parity_detail. persist_to_disk(state_id, dest_path): serialize SSMStateSnapshot via bincode or candle Tensor to_vec; write `{ artifact: bytes, metadata: StateVectorPersistMetadata }` to ArtifactStore; mint StateVectorArtifactId v7. StateVectorPersistMetadata: `{ state_id, model_id, model_artifact_sha256, variant: SSMVariant, n_tokens_advanced, persisted_at_utc, persisted_by: OperatorId, content_hash, license_tag }`. load_from_disk(artifact_id) -> Result<SSMStateSnapshot, ModelRuntimeError>: read metadata, verify variant matches target model, verify model_artifact_sha256 matches the currently-loaded model's sha256 (or warn + fail per operator policy), deserialize tensors, validate content_hash. Failure modes: variant mismatch -> Err; sha256 mismatch -> Err with explicit guidance ("snapshot was taken against a different model artifact; either load that artifact or recapture"); deserialization error -> Err. ArtifactStore integration: persist_to_disk goes through KernelActionCatalogV1 `kernel.subquadratic.persist_state` action -> WriteBoxV1. Tests: persist on Mamba2, simulate process restart by dropping the model+state and reloading, load_from_disk, generate continuation; assert deterministic. Sha256-mismatch test. Variant-mismatch test. MULTI-QUARTER applies.
risk_if_missed: INF-9 cross-session restore missing; SSM state ephemeral; operator E-2 breached.
validator_focus: Process-restart simulation test; sha256 + variant validation enforced; mutations through KernelActionCatalogV1.

minimum_controls: Process-restart simulation test (drop + reload + restore deterministic).
